title: April 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 20''' is the 110th day of the year (111th in leap years). There are 255 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[Jerry Harte]] is born.
*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[George Takei]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[John Ostrander]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Clint Howard]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Andy Serkis]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Justin Ponsor]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Eric Lopez]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Darth Vader Strikes]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*1981 – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[Death Star's Transit]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 96|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 96]] published.
*[[1990]] – [[Alex McCrindle]] dies.
*[[2000]] – [[Coco Grayson]] is born.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 4|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' 4]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Unknown Regions]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''Dark Horse Presents #1'' published.<noinclude><ref name="Presents1">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/17-843/Dark-Horse-Presents-1-Paul-Chadwick-cover|text=Dark Horse Presents #1}}</ref></noinclude>
*[[2016]] – [[Obi-Wan and Anakin 4|''Obi-Wan and Anakin'' 4]] published.
*2016 – "[[Hunting for Han]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 17|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 17]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story Sound Book]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[The First Order]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' re-released for the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Switch|Nintendo Switch]].
*[[2025]] – [[Celebration Japan (2025)]] ends.
*2025 – "[[The Rainy Day Beast / Upgraded]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
